source_pr.title: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/46302

Problem Summary:
1. restore wait tiflash ready need handle partition tables
2. tiflash refresh ticker need 2 seconds to trigger. so make the test sleep 3 seconds.
### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

test.name: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test

symptoms: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test
failure_signature: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing-sensitive asynchronous behavior (background tasks/events not fully settled). Fixed waits without polling/backoff are brittle under CI timing jitter. This PR stabilizes it by: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test.
fix_pattern: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test

evidence: evidence: br: wait tiflash replicas ready && fix unstable test
